lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੇਦ ਕੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਬਿਆਪੇ ਮਨ ਕੈ ਮਾਨ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saasatr bed kee bidh nahee jaaneh biaape man kai maan |2|
lines.english: He knows nothing of the Vedas or the Shaastras; his mind is gripped by pride. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹਿ ਸੋਮ ਪਾਕੁ ਹਿਰਹਿ ਪਰ ਦਰਬਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਝੂਠ ਗੁਮਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: kareh som paak hireh par darabaa antar jhootth gumaan |
lines.english: The mortal eats the food which he has carefully prepared, and then steals the wealth of others. His inner being is filled with falsehood and pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਊਝੜਿ ਪਾਏ ਨਿਹਫਲ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਮਾਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prabhoo bhulaae aoojharr paae nihafal sabh karamaan |3|
lines.english: God made him stray from the path, and sent him into the wilderness. All his actions are useless. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਧਿਆ ਕਾਲ ਕਰਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਵਰਤਾ ਜਿਉ ਸਫਰੀ ਦੰਫਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sandhiaa kaal kareh sabh varataa jiau safaree danfaan |
lines.english: He says his evening prayers, and observes all the fasts, but this is all just a show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓੁਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਉਧਰਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਸ੍ਵਾਨ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: oun satigur sev param pad paaeaa udhariaa sagal bisvaan |4|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, he obtains the supreme status and saves the whole world. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਸੋ ਬੈਸਨੌ ਪੜੑਿਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: so giaanee so baisanau parraiaa jis karee kripaa bhagavaan |
lines.english: He alone is a spiritual teacher, and he alone is a devotee of Vishnu and a scholar, whom the Lord God blesses with His Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਹਮ ਕਥਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਥਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣਹ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਬੋੁਲਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa ham kathah kichh kath nahee jaanah prabh bhaavai tivai boulaan |
lines.english: What can I say? I don't know what to say. As God wills, so do I speak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਇਕ ਮਾਂਗਉ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਇਓ ਸਰਾਨ ॥੫॥੨॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat kee dhoor ik maangau jan naanak peo saraan |5|2|
lines.english: I ask only for the dust of the feet of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. Servant Nanak seeks their Sanctuary. ||5||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੁ ਰਗੀਲਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਲਹੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laal rageelaa sahaje paaeo satigur bachan laho |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have intuitively obtained my Darling Beloved. Through the Word of the True Guru's Teachings, I found Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਰੋ ਨਾਚਨੋ ਰਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: ab moro naachano raho |
lines.english: Now, my dancing is over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਸੁਰਿਜਨੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਆਇਓ ਤਬ ਮੁਖੁ ਕਾਜਿ ਲਜੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jau surijan grih bheetar aaeo tab mukh kaaj lajo |1|
lines.english: but when he comes home, she becomes shy, and modestly covers her face. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਆਰ ਕੰਨਿਆ ਜੈਸੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹੇਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਬਚਨ ਉਪਹਾਸ ਕਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: kuaar kaniaa jaise sang saheree pria bachan upahaas kaho |
lines.english: The virgin speaks with her friends about her husband and they laugh together;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕਨਿਕੋ ਕੋਠਾਰੀ ਚੜਿਓ ਕਬਰੋ ਹੋਤ ਫਿਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jiau kaniko kotthaaree charrio kabaro hot firo |
lines.english: When gold is melted in the crucible, it flows freely everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਤੇ ਸੁਧ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਬਾਰਹਿ ਤਬ ਤੇ ਥਾਨ ਥਿਰੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jab te sudh bhe hai baareh tab te thaan thiro |2|
lines.english: But when it is made into pure solid bars of gold, then it remains stationary. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਤਊ ਲਉ ਬਜਿਓ ਮੂਰਤ ਘਰੀ ਪਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: jau din rain taoo lau bajio moorat gharee palo |
lines.english: As long as the days and the nights of one's life last, the clock strikes the hours, minutes and seconds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਜਾਵਨਹਾਰੋ ਊਠਿ ਸਿਧਾਰਿਓ ਤਬ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਾਜੁ ਨ ਭਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bajaavanahaaro aootth sidhaario tab fir baaj na bheo |3|
lines.english: But when the gong player gets up and leaves, the gong is not sounded again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੁੰਭੁ ਜਲੈ ਮਹਿ ਡਾਰਿਓ ਅੰਭੈ ਅੰਭ ਮਿਲੋ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kunbh jalai meh ddaario anbhai anbh milo |4|3|
lines.english: Says Nanak, when the pitcher is emptied out, the water mingles again with water. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਕੁੰਭ ਉਦਕ ਪੂਰਿ ਆਨਿਓ ਤਬ ਓੁਹੁ ਭਿੰਨ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaise kunbh udak poor aanio tab ouhu bhin drisatto |
lines.english: When the pitcher is filled with water, the water contained within it seems distinct.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਪੂਛੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: ab poochhe kiaa kahaa |
lines.english: Now if he is asked, what can he say?

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈਨੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਨੀਕੋ ਬਾਵਰ ਬਿਖੁ ਸਿਉ ਗਹਿ ਰਹਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laino naam amrit ras neeko baavar bikh siau geh rahaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He was supposed to have gathered the sublime essence of the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, but instead, the mad-man was busy with poison. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਲਭ ਜਨਮੁ ਚਿਰੰਕਾਲ ਪਾਇਓ ਜਾਤਉ ਕਉਡੀ ਬਦਲਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: dulabh janam chirankaal paaeo jaatau kauddee badalahaa |
lines.english: This human life, so difficult to obtain, was finally obtained after such a long time. He is losing it in exchange for a shell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਓ ਲਾਭੁ ਲਾਭਨ ਕੈ ਤਾਈ ਮੋਹਨਿ ਠਾਗਉਰੀ ਸਿਉ ਉਲਝਿ ਪਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aaeo laabh laabhan kai taaee mohan tthaagauree siau ulajh pahaa |
lines.english: He comes in search of profits, but he is entangled in the enticing illusion of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਥੂਰੀ ਕੋ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਆਇਓ ਲਾਦਿਓ ਕਾਲਰ ਬਿਰਖ ਜਿਵਹਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaathooree ko gaahak aaeo laadio kaalar birakh jivahaa |1|
lines.english: He came to buy musk, but instead, he has loaded dust and thistle grass. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਚ ਬਾਦਰੈ ਲਾਲੁ ਖੋਈ ਹੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਇਹੁ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਕਦਿ ਲਹਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaach baadarai laal khoee hai fir ihu aausar kad lahaa |2|
lines.english: He loses the jewel, in exchange for mere glass. When will he have this blessed opportunity again? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਪਰਾਧ ਏਕੁ ਗੁਣੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਛੋਡਹ ਦਾਸਿ ਭਜਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagal paraadh ek gun naahee tthaakur chhoddah daas bhajahaa |
lines.english: He is full of sins, and he has not even one redeeming virtue. Forsaking his Lord and Master, he is involved with Maya, God's slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਈ ਮਸਟਿ ਜੜਵਤ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ਜਿਉ ਤਸਕਰੁ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਂਨੑਿਹਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aaee masatt jarravat kee niaaee jiau tasakar dar saanaihaa |3|
lines.english: And when the final silence comes, like inanimate matter, he is caught like a thief at the door. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਉਪਾਉ ਨ ਕੋਊ ਸੂਝੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਾਸਾ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਰਿ ਰਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: aan upaau na koaoo soojhai har daasaa saranee par rahaa |
lines.english: I cannot see any other way out. I seek the Sanctuary of the Lord's slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਬ ਹੀ ਮਨ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਜਉ ਸਗਲੇ ਅਉਗਨ ਮੇਟਿ ਧਰਹਾ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tab hee man chhutteeai jau sagale aaugan mett dharahaa |4|4|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the mortal is emancipated, only when all his demerits and faults are erased and eradicated. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਧੀਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਬਿਰਾਗਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: maaee dheer rahee pria bahut biraagio |
lines.english: O mother, my patience is gone. I am in love with my Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਆਨੂਪ ਰੰਗ ਰੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਸਿਉ ਰੁਚੈ ਨ ਲਾਗਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik bhaant aanoop rang re tina siau ruchai na laagio |1| rahaau |
lines.english: There are so many kinds of incomparable pleasures, but I am not interested in any of them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਸਿ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਮੁਖਿ ਟੇਰਉ ਨਂ‍ੀਦ ਪਲਕ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਗਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: nis baasur pria pria mukh tterau naneed palak nahee jaagio |
lines.english: Night and day, I utter, "Pri-a, Pri-a - Beloved, Beloved" with my mouth. I cannot sleep, even for an instant; I remain awake and aware.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰ ਕਜਰ ਬਸਤ੍ਰ ਅਨਿਕ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਸਭੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਾਗਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haar kajar basatr anik seegaar re bin pir sabhai bikh laagio |1|
lines.english: Necklaces, eye make-up, fancy clothes and decorations - without my Husband Lord, these are all poison to me. ||1||
